name: Vamos Rafa
short_description: A Dark 3D Platformer Hardcore Experience. Guide Rafa through treacherous heights, lit by flickering ghostly flames, with every move a battle to survive. The climb begins when you take control.
detailed_description:
Help Rafa find his way home.

In this dark fantasy world, every jump counts. The towering cliffs are haunted by echoes of the past that seek to pull Rafa back into the abyss. As he climbs, the air grows thinner, the ledges narrower, and the shadows deeper, but Rafa’s hope shines brighter with each step.

Players must guide Rafa through treacherous heights, lit by flickering ghostly flames, with every move a battle to survive.

Will Rafa reach the safety of his home above the clouds, or will the darkness claim him forever? The climb begins when you take control.
